mapper.select: SELECT * FROM skill_association_rules ORDER BY confidence DESC, lift DESC
SELECT * FROM skill_association_rules WHERE DATE(created_at) = #{date} ORDER BY confidence DESC, lift DESC
SELECT * FROM skill_association_rules ORDER BY confidence DESC LIMIT #{topN}
SELECT * FROM skill_association_rules ORDER BY lift DESC LIMIT #{topN}
SELECT * FROM skill_association_rules WHERE skill_a = #{skillA} ORDER BY confidence DESC
SELECT * FROM skill_association_rules WHERE skill_b = #{skillB} ORDER BY confidence DESC
SELECT * FROM skill_association_rules WHERE skill_a = #{skillA} AND skill_b = #{skillB}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_association_rules (skill_a, skill_b, support, confidence, lift, created_at) VALUES (#{skillA}, #{skillB}, #{support}, #{confidence}, #{lift}, NOW())

INSERT INTO skill_association_rules (skill_a, skill_b, support, confidence, lift, created_at) VALUES
(#{rule.skillA}, #{rule.skillB}, #{rule.support}, #{rule.confidence}, #{rule.lift}, NOW())
